figures.caption: Fig. 1. Safe navigation of a polytopic ego vehicle with first-order dynamics around an obstacle vehicle moving along a circular trajectory. The top panel shows the trajectories of the ego vehicle (blue) and the obstacle (orange), where the orange dash-dotted circles illustrate the estimated obstacle sets. The three snapshots inside the dotted rectangle depict consecutive instants. The bottom panel depicts the estimated and true CBF values over time.

Fig. 2. Navigation of a polytopic ego vehicle with second-order dynamics around an obstacle vehicle moving along a circular trajectory. The top panel shows the trajectories of the ego vehicle (blue) and the obstacle (orange), where the orange dash-dotted circles illustrate the estimated obstacle sets. The three snapshots inside the dotted rectangle depict consecutive instants. The bottom panel depicts the estimated and true CBF values over time.
